verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Therefore the redeemed Of the Lord shall return, And come with singing unto Zion; And everlasting joy Shall be upon their head. Therefore the redeemed Of the Lord shall return, And come with singing unto Zion; And everlasting joy Shall be upon their head

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: They shall obtain gladness and joy; And sorrow and mourning shall flee away. Therefore the redeemed Of the Lord shall return, And come with singing unto Zion; And everlasting joy Shall be upon their head.
